name: Amaretto Chicken
recipeIngredient: 6 1/4 ounces Frozen Orange Juice, thawed and strained
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the frozen orange juice with half a can of water. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Combine flour, salt, pepper, paprika, and garlic powder in a shallow dish. Coat chicken breasts evenly with this mixture.
3. Heat oil and butter in a large skillet over medium heat. Sauté chicken until brown on all sides, about 4-5 minutes per side.
4. Remove the chicken from the skillet and place it in a greased casserole dish.
5. In the same skillet, add Dijon mustard, thawed orange juice, and Amaretto. Bring to a gentle boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
6. Reduce heat to low and pour the sauce evenly over the chicken breasts in the casserole dish.
7. Cover the dish with foil or a lid and bake for 45 minutes, until the internal temperature of the chicken reaches 165 degrees Fahrenheit.
8. Remove from oven and let rest for 5 minutes before serving. This dish can be frozen for later use and reheated thoroughly. Serves 8 - 10.
